value:
Thanks for reaching out. I can see there's a significant discrepancy between your booked fare (₹99), the amount charged (₹116), and the bill you received (₹829)—and it sounds like the route taken doesn't match what you expected. This definitely needs to be looked into.

To help resolve this quickly, could you share a bit more detail about what happened? Specifically, did the driver take a different route than planned, or was there an issue with the trip itself? Once I understand the full picture, I'll be able to get this sorted for you right away.
